title: mentha gentilis var. crispa
intro: Mentha gentilis var. crispa, also known as Corn Mint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family and native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Corn Mint include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from headaches and colds. Corn Mint can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine.
